pipeline_status.poller: QUIET (19th consecutive). WIN count: 69 unchanged. Dome site stable.
pipeline_status.analyst: No new WIN files, no new proposals this run.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 2 pending reviews processed (WIN-068 c5 moderate/minor; WIN-027 c6 stale)

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. V51.1 stable. Ongoing banner inconsistency (10 vs 9 Prospective) and accuracy rate inconsistency (93.3% vs 94.5%) unchanged.

stale_reviews.note: Stale: c6 sole finding (sub-meter → sub-millimetre in tldr_verdict) already resolved by commit a40e223 before the review was written. Marked processed without action.

patches_applied.description: Removed self-referential triple-count: finding text listed WIN-068 in its own triple-count list (WIN-010, WIN-025, AND WIN-068). Rephrased to clarify WIN-068 duplicates basis already counted in WIN-010 and WIN-025.
Removed unverifiable Meza et al. 2021 citation from detail_verdict_text. Flagged in c4 and c5 with no journal/volume/pages; cannot verify. Chapman 1933 alone is sufficient.
Corrected nine-year gap to eight-year gap. Kim & Chang published 2018; V51.0 early 2026 = 8 years, not 9. Arithmetic error that a dome defender could exploit.

Rephrased cascade cross-reference in detail_evidence to be self-contained. Old text: 'seasonally indeterminate across the 39-eclipse ensemble' (opaque). New text explains the concern explicitly without requiring Section 1.8 prereq.

expansions_created.notes: Defense survives 3/5: dome defender can argue both Sq models and dome FSF use empirical parameters. Curmudgeon preemptive recommendation: add sentence distinguishing FSF (circularly fitted to eclipse data) from Sq parameters (measured independently by ionosondes/satellites). Analyst Mode 3.

recommended_actions.action: Analyst Mode 3: EXP-167 — WIN-068 defense neutralization. Add sentence distinguishing FSF circular fitting from independent Sq parameter measurement.
ISS-1043 (open): WIN-044 code_analysis.monitoring tagged none but monitor.py may track it. Needs investigation.
ISS-997 (open): Part 4 and Part 5 inline italic transition sentence — minor prose fix.

notes: WIN-027 c6 was the sole minor remaining issue (tldr_verdict sub-meter vs sub-millimetre). That fix landed in commit a40e223 before the c6 review was written — a clean example of the pipeline self-healing faster than the review cycle. WIN-068 is now at 0 open issues; pushed to curmudgeon queue for c6 review of patched content.
